     The Numbers Business Report

Wonder (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $132,422,809Details
International Box Office $177,756,811
Worldwide Box Office $310,179,620
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,076,294
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,776,969
Total $25,853,263
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of August Pullman, born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade. As his family, his new classmates, and the larger community all struggle to discover their compassion and acceptance, Auggie’s extraordinary journey will unite them all and prove you can't blend in when you were born to stand out.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,547,866 (20.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.81 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 15.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,096 opening theaters/3,519 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $176,341,147

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 17th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 17th, 2017 (Wide), released as Gerumo stebuklas (Lithuania)
November 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Egypt)
November 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Qatar)
November 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Israel)
November 16th, 2017 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: January 30th, 2018 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements including bullying, and some mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2464 (Cert #50925), 2/22/2017)
Running Time: 113 minutes
Franchise: Wonder
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, Family Affair
Plot point: Birth Defects, Bullies, Coming of Age, Home Schooled
Subgenre: Family Drama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media, Walden Media, Mandeville Films, Lionsgate
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The story of August Pullman, born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade. As his family, his new classmates, and the larger community all struggle to discover their compassion and acceptance, Auggie’s extraordinary journey will unite them all and prove you can't blend in when you were born to stand out.
